steps.title: Analyze the equation
steps.content: Take the square root of both sides of $$x^2=2{,}601.$$ Since $51^2=2{,}601$, $x=\pm 51$.

steps.title: Count the solutions
steps.content: There are two real solutions, $51$ and $-51$. That matches choice C — C is correct.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: As a final check, compare the result from the work to the answer choices. The value, equation, or condition found above matches choice C, Exactly two, and the other choices fail the same setup or substitution. Therefore C is correct.
